name: Robert Pragada
background: Mr. Pragada has served as Chief Executive Officer since January 2023 and as a Director since joining the Board in 2022. He previously served as President and Chief Operating Officer from 2019 to 2023. He first joined Jacobs in 2006 and held several executive roles before a brief departure to serve as President and CEO of the Brock Group from 2014 to 2016, returning to Jacobs in 2016.
